summary: Backend-only testing for Sprint 1 Task Engine. All 19 pytest tests passed covering CRUD operations, task actions (complete/snooze/dismiss/edit), daily summary, and system task generation.

GET_tasks_filter_today.details: Returns pending tasks due today with correct structure

GET_tasks_filter_all.details: Returns all tasks regardless of status

GET_tasks_summary.details: Returns daily counts: total_today, completed_today, pending_today, overdue, progress_pct, activity

POST_create_task.details: Creates manual task with title, priority, action_type, suggested_message

POST_create_task_empty_title.details: Returns 400 if title is empty or whitespace

PATCH_complete_task.details: action=complete marks task as completed with timestamp

PATCH_snooze_task.details: action=snooze sets snoozed_until and updates due_date

PATCH_edit_task.details: action=edit updates allowed fields (title, description, priority, action_type, suggested_message)

POST_generate_system_tasks.details: Runs without error and returns {created, user_id}

task_completion_logs_event.details: Completing a task with contact_id logs a contact_event with event_type=task_completed

critical_code_review_comments: Task model uses idempotency_key with partial filter index to prevent duplicate system tasks - correctly implemented
Legacy compat: serializer maps completed=True to status=completed for backward compatibility
System tasks use idempotency keys: dormant_{user_id}_{contact_id}_{date}, birthday_{...}, anniversary_{...}
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 1 Task Engine fully tested. All CRUD operations, task actions (complete/snooze/dismiss/edit), summary endpoint, and system task generation working correctly. Idempotency keys prevent duplicate system tasks. Database has 2 completed tasks for user 69a0b7095fddcede09591667.
